description: Complete submarine classification hierarchy for PhysWorldLM military ontology. Covers platform class, operational role, propulsion class, and generation.

SSN.label: Attack Submarine
SSN.description: Nuclear-powered fast attack submarine optimized for sea denial, ASW, and ISR.

SSBN.label: Ballistic Missile Submarine
SSBN.description: Nuclear-powered submarine providing strategic nuclear deterrence via SLBMs.

SSGN.label: Guided Missile Submarine
SSGN.description: Nuclear-powered submarine with large-capacity VLS for land attack and anti-ship cruise missiles.

SSK.label: Diesel-Electric Submarine
SSK.description: Conventional diesel-electric submarine; highly quiet when on batteries.

SSP.label: Air-Independent Propulsion Submarine
SSP.description: Conventional submarine with AIP module enabling extended submerged endurance without snorkeling.

SSM.label: Midget Submarine
SSM.description: Small submarine for coastal operations, special forces insertion, and mine laying.

SSA.label: Autonomous Submarine
SSA.description: Unmanned or optionally manned submarine for ISR, mine warfare, and attrition missions.

SST.label: Training Submarine
SST.description: Dedicated submarine platform for crew training and qualification.

SSR.label: Research Submarine
SSR.description: Scientific and military research platform for oceanography and acoustic research.

SSRN.label: Rescue Submarine
SSRN.description: Deep submergence rescue vehicle (DSRV) or submarine rescue system.

StrategicDeterrence.label: Strategic Nuclear Deterrence
StrategicDeterrence.description: Continuous at-sea nuclear deterrent patrol with SLBMs.

SeaDenial.label: Sea Denial
SeaDenial.description: Preventing adversary naval operations in a defined maritime area.
SeaDenial.simulation_relevance: Area denial physics, torpedo engagement envelopes

SeaControl.label: Sea Control
SeaControl.description: Establishing and maintaining maritime dominance in an operational area.

LandAttack.label: Land Attack
LandAttack.description: Precision strike against shore targets using cruise missiles.
LandAttack.simulation_relevance: VLS salvo planning, cruise missile flight path simulation

AntiShipWarfare.label: Anti-Surface Warfare
AntiShipWarfare.description: Targeting and engaging surface ships with torpedoes or anti-ship missiles.

AntiSubmarineWarfare.label: Anti-Submarine Warfare
AntiSubmarineWarfare.description: Detection, tracking, and engagement of adversary submarines.
AntiSubmarineWarfare.simulation_relevance: Passive sonar modeling, acoustic environment simulation

ISR.label: Intelligence, Surveillance & Reconnaissance
ISR.description: Covert intelligence gathering, SIGINT, and ELINT collection.
ISR.simulation_relevance: Acoustic track recording, emission collection modeling

MineLaying.label: Mine Laying
MineLaying.description: Covert deployment of naval mines in contested waters.
MineLaying.simulation_relevance: Mine pattern planning, hydrodynamic mine drift

SpecialOperations.label: Special Forces Deployment
SpecialOperations.description: Insertion and extraction of special operations forces.

UUVCarriage.label: UUV Carrier & Control
UUVCarriage.description: Deployment and control of unmanned underwater vehicles.
UUVCarriage.simulation_relevance: UUV swarm coordination, acoustic data link modeling

MineCountermeasures.label: Mine Countermeasures
MineCountermeasures.description: Detection and neutralization of naval mines.
MineCountermeasures.simulation_relevance: Mine detection sonar, UUV MCM sweep patterns

SearchAndRescue.label: Search and Rescue
SearchAndRescue.description: Locating and rescuing downed crew or disabled submarines.

OceanographicSurvey.label: Oceanographic Survey
OceanographicSurvey.description: Mapping ocean floor, measuring currents, temperature, and salinity.

ElectronicIntelligence.label: Electronic Intelligence
ElectronicIntelligence.description: Passive collection of adversary radar, communications, and electronic emissions.
ElectronicIntelligence.simulation_relevance: RF signal propagation through sea-air boundary

EscortOperations.label: Escort Operations
EscortOperations.description: Providing ASW screen for surface task groups.

Gen1.label: First Generation (1950s–1960s)
Gen1.description: Early nuclear boats; high reactor noise, limited electronics.

Gen2.label: Second Generation (1960s–1970s)
Gen2.description: Improved reactors, first towed arrays, basic TASS.

Gen3.label: Third Generation (1970s–1980s)
Gen3.description: Anechoic tiles, improved sonar, digital fire control.

Gen4.label: Fourth Generation (1990s–2010s)
Gen4.description: Pump-jet propulsors, advanced sonar, VLS integration.

Gen5.label: Fifth Generation (2010s–present)
Gen5.description: AI-assisted CMS, multi-static sonar, UUV carriage, AIP.
